title: plantago maritima var. alpina
intro: Plantago maritima var. alpina, also known as sea plantain, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of sea plantain include its ability to support respiratory health, improve digestion, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular remedy for urinary issues and fluid retention. Sea plantain can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
